title: rubus hypopitys
intro: Rubus hypopitys, also known as the dwarf raspberry or thimbleberry, is a plant species belonging to the Rubus genus of brambles. The medicinal properties of Rubus hypopitys include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits. The health benefits of Rubus hypopitys include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Rubus hypopitys include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
